title: T-037 — UI: PLN-013 D365 SO Queue + Draft WO Review (parity with plan_d365_queue)
prompt:
Build PLN-013 D365 SO Queue page at `src/app/(planning)/planning/d365/page.tsx` matching prototype `design/Monopilot Design System/planning/other-screens.jsx:510-648` 1:1. Per PRD §15.7.

Layout: pull history strip (last_run, so_count, draft_wo_count, errors), draft WO table with expandable cascade chain rows, pull errors collapsible (retry button → Server Action), manual trigger button (PLN-025 modal), filter bar (SO ref search, SO status, WO status, time range).

Disabled-state surface when feature flag integration.d365.so_trigger.enabled = false. RBAC: read=planning.dashboard.view; trigger=integration.d365.so_trigger.run.

RED RTL test asserts disabled-state, error retry, expand row reveals cascade.

pipeline_inputs.description: D365 SO queue page with pull history, draft WO review table, filter bar, disabled-state.
pipeline_inputs.details: Prototype reference: planning/other-screens.jsx:510-648. Pull history strip pulls aggregates from outbox_events. Draft WO row click → PLN-027 modal (T-052). Manual trigger → PLN-025 modal (T-051). Disabled-state: when feature flag off, shows tinted overlay with copy 'D365 integration is disabled. Enable in Planning Settings.' Parity checklist: (1) pull history strip metrics ordering, (2) filter bar layout, (3) draft WO row expand affordance, (4) error retry button placement.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/planning/other-screens.jsx:510-648`, then it has the same pull history strip metrics order, the same filter bar layout, the same draft WO table columns, and the same retry affordance — parity verified by RTL snapshot per the checklist.
Given d365_so_trigger_enabled=false, when the page renders, then the trigger button is disabled with tooltip 'Enable in Planning Settings'.
Given an error row is rendered, when the retry button is clicked, then a Server Action is invoked and a toast confirms enqueue.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/components/planning/d365/__tests__/D365Queue.test.tsx`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED RTL test asserts parity, disabled-state behavior, retry click triggers Server Action mock.
Playwright e2e: navigate to /planning/d365, expect filter bar + history strip.
Run `pnpm vitest run` and `pnpm playwright test`.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow trigger when feature flag off.
Do not skip RBAC for retry button.
